titles.text: もってけたまご with がんばれ！かものはし

descriptions.text: Motteke Tamago with Ganbare! Kamonohashi is a top-down Bomberman-style multiplayer arcade action game, and an enhanced port of the PC Engine game Motteke Tamago. This version includes the same arcade mode as the original release, and also adds a single-player story mode with multiple stages and new creatures to play as other than ducks, such as frogs and platypus.
